citable_reuse_rule: Snapshot and live numbering match; reuse with CCR-008 plus the Figure 1 / Table 1 control bundle.

citable_reuse_rule: When citing the frozen paper figure, keep "snapshot Figure 2 / live Figure 5" explicit until one manuscript package is frozen; always carry CCR-005.

paper_thesis_use: Prevents reviewer confusion when the same evidence-tier funnel appears under different figure numbers across frozen and live packages.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Figure-numbering router for funnel prose, legends, and cover-note clarification.
